vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 2 of #845 triage v1: append-only audit log at `vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl` + frozen JSON schema. Owner: Agent A2 (wave 1, parallel with A1). Independent of cache content; consumed by Story 3 (triage actions) and Story 4 (bulk + freshness).

plan.title: feat(scripts,vbrief/schemas): triage candidates.jsonl audit log + JSON schema

narratives.Problem: Triage decisions need a reversible audit trail. Without it, `task triage:reset <N>` and `task triage:history <N>` (Story 3) cannot be implemented. Sidecar JSONL chosen over vBRIEF schema extension to decouple from ADR-001 outcome.
narratives.Overview: Implement `scripts/candidates_log.py` providing append/read/scan operations on `vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl`. Each line is a JSON object validated against `vbrief/schemas/candidates.schema.json`. Schema fields (frozen interface for downstream agents): `decision_id` (uuid), `timestamp` (ISO-8601 UTC), `repo` (owner/name), `issue_number` (int), `decision` (enum: accept|reject|defer|needs-ac|mark-duplicate|reset), `actor` (string: user identity or `agent:<name>`), `reason` (string, optional), `linked_to` (int, only for mark-duplicate), `prior_decision_id` (uuid, only for reset).
narratives.Constraint: Append-only: writer MUST NOT rewrite existing lines. Reader MUST be tolerant of malformed lines (skip + warn, don't crash). Schema MUST validate via standard JSON Schema 2020-12 draft. File MUST be created with parent directory if missing. Concurrent appends across process boundaries safe via `with portalocker.Lock(...)` or equivalent advisory lock.
narratives.Outcome: Module `scripts/candidates_log.py` exposes `append(entry: dict) -> str`, `read_all(repo: str | None = None) -> list[dict]`, `find_by_issue(issue_number: int, repo: str) -> list[dict]`, `latest_decision(issue_number: int, repo: str) -> dict | None`. Schema validates all writer output. Tests cover: (1) append + read round-trip; (2) malformed-line tolerance; (3) concurrent append safety; (4) schema-rejection of invalid entries; (5) reset-references-prior contract.
narratives.Test: pytest tests/test_candidates_log.py covering: (1) append+read; (2) skip malformed line; (3) concurrent append from threads; (4) schema rejection on missing required fields; (5) latest_decision returns most recent by timestamp.
narratives.Action: Implement scripts/candidates_log.py public surface above. Author vbrief/schemas/candidates.schema.json (JSON Schema 2020-12). NO Taskfile fragment in this story — triage actions (Story 3) wire the user-facing tasks. Provide a programmatic library only.

items.title: vbrief/schemas/candidates.schema.json with all 9 fields per Overview, JSON Schema 2020-12 draft
Concurrent-append safety via advisory lock (portalocker or equivalent stdlib path)
tests/test_candidates_log.py covers all 5 test cases per Test narrative
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry: feat(triage): candidates.jsonl audit log + schema (#845 Story 2)

files_must_not_touch: tasks/* (no Taskfile changes in this story)

references.title: Epic vBRIEF for #845 (related-plan; planRef captures parent semantic)
